description: The Problem Atlas — the failures executives fear most. Each is analyzed for root cause, multi-dimensional impact, early-warning signals, prevention, and mapped to the NIRVA products (`nirva`), standards_kb controls (`controls`) and standards (`standards`) that address it. This is the demand-side argument for the whole platform.

problems.name: Ghost Employee
problems.fear: Paying for people who don't exist or don't work
problems.root_cause: No tamper-proof link between a paid headcount and a verified human at a real place/time. Paper/Excel/LINE rosters are trivially padded.

impact.financial: Direct salary leakage 2-8% of payroll; in a 1,356-staff firm even 1% ≈ millions/yr
impact.legal: Fraud, false invoicing to clients, contract breach on headcount SLAs
impact.reputation: Client trust collapse if a site is found understaffed

early_warning: Headcount billed > headcount verified on site
prevention: Reconcile billed vs verified headcount per site
problems.best_practice: Biometric/geo-fenced verification with immutable evidence and periodic contract-headcount reconciliation

problems.name: Payroll Fraud
problems.fear: Manipulated hours, rates, or phantom overtime
problems.root_cause: Payroll computed from un-auditable inputs; same person enters, approves and pays.
early_warning: Edits to time records after cutoff
problems.best_practice: SoD + immutable time source + analytics flags feeding internal audit

problems.name: Fake Attendance / Buddy Punching
problems.fear: Check-ins that don't reflect real presence
problems.root_cause: Shared logins, photos of photos, location spoofing; LINE check-in has no integrity guarantees.
problems.best_practice: Multi-signal verification (geo + liveness + device) with anomaly scoring

problems.name: Procurement Fraud / Kickbacks
problems.fear: Inflated prices, fake vendors, split POs
problems.root_cause: Opaque approvals, no vendor due diligence, no spend analytics, weak SoD.
problems.best_practice: Closed-loop request→PO→receipt→pay with anti-bribery controls and audit trail

problems.name: Compliance Failure
problems.fear: Failing an audit, losing certification or a contract
problems.root_cause: Evidence scattered in Excel/PDF; controls not monitored; surprise at audit time.
problems.best_practice: Always-audit-ready posture via continuous monitoring (the standards_kb engine)

problems.name: Data Breach / Privacy Violation
problems.fear: Leaking client or employee personal data
problems.root_cause: Personal data in unsecured Excel/LINE/email; no access control, no RoPA, no consent records.

impact.financial: PDPA fines up to ฿5M/offence, breach response cost

problems.best_practice: Privacy-by-design with ISO 27701/PDPA controls and a single privacy data store

problems.name: Knowledge Loss
problems.fear: Know-how walks out the door when people leave
problems.root_cause: Knowledge lives in individuals' heads and private chats, not in the organization.
problems.best_practice: Decouple knowledge from people via ISO 30401 KMS + organizational memory

problems.name: High Turnover
problems.fear: Losing staff faster than you can replace them
problems.root_cause: Low dignity/recognition, unfair treatment, no growth path, surveillance culture.

problems.name: Contract Risk
problems.root_cause: Contract terms not linked to operational reality; no live SLA tracking.
problems.best_practice: Contract compliance layer that ties obligations to verified operational evidence

problems.name: Operational Blind Spot
problems.fear: Not seeing problems until they're disasters
problems.root_cause: Data fragmented across Excel/PDF/LINE; no single source of truth; reporting is backward-looking.
problems.best_practice: Executive intelligence layer with leading indicators and AI daily briefing

problems.name: Safety Incident
problems.fear: A worker is injured or killed on site
problems.root_cause: Hazards not assessed/controlled; no near-miss reporting; training gaps.
problems.best_practice: ISO 45001 OH&S management with proactive hazard & incident workflows

problems.name: Customer Complaint Spiral
problems.fear: Quality issues escalating into lost contracts
problems.root_cause: Complaints not captured/resolved systematically; no root-cause loop.
problems.best_practice: ISO 10002/10004 complaints & satisfaction loop feeding improvement

problems.name: Poor Documentation
problems.fear: No reliable records when it matters
problems.root_cause: Documents uncontrolled, multiple versions, no retention; evidence missing at audit/legal moments.
problems.best_practice: ISO 9001 §7.5 documented-information discipline with controlled repository

problems.name: Workforce Shortage / No-Show
problems.root_cause: No real-time visibility of who's actually on site vs required; reactive scheduling.
problems.best_practice: Live staffing dashboard with required-vs-verified gap alerts

problems.name: Leadership / Key-Person Dependency
problems.fear: The business stops if one person is gone
problems.root_cause: Decisions, relationships and knowledge concentrated in a few heads.
problems.best_practice: Institutionalize know-how & decisions so the org outlives individuals

problems.name: Single Point of Failure
problems.fear: One system/person/site failing takes everything down
problems.root_cause: No redundancy, no continuity plan, critical processes undocumented.
problems.best_practice: ISO 22301 business continuity with tested recovery and documented criticality
